messages.content: List exactly 5 Bible verses about forgiveness. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

message.content:
Colossians 3:13 | Forgive one another if any have a grievance against you; even as Christ forgave you, so also do you.
Ephesians 4:32 | And be ye kind one to another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, even as God for基督's sake hath forgiven you.
Matthew 6:14 | For if ye forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you;
Luke 6:37 | Judge not, and ye shall not be judged; condemn not, and ye shall not be condemned: forgive, and ye shall be forgiven:
Colossians 2:15 | And having spoiled principalities and powers he made a show of them openly, triumphing over them in it. (Note: This verse describes victory but does not contain the word "forgiveness" explicitly as requested; please see corrected list below)

Ephesians 4:32 | And be ye kind one to another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another even as God in Christ hath forgiven you.

Matthew 6:14 | For if thou shalt forgive men their trespasses, thy heavenly Father will also forgive thee.
Luke 23:34 | Verily I say unto thee, today shalt thou be with me in paradise; (Contextually linked to forgiveness of those crucifying Him).
